narrative.description: Nintendo's Wii sequel streamlines hub structure while adding Yoshi, drill, and cloud caps across dense planetoid stages.
narrative.core_loop: Collect Power Stars on Starship Mario, use Yoshi and power-ups, and defeat Bowser across compact galactic courses.

mechanics.map_notes: Core planet gravity platforming defines Super Mario Galaxy 2 stage design.
mechanics.expression: Core planet gravity platforming defines Super Mario Galaxy 2 stage design.

mechanics.map_notes: Super Mario Galaxy 2 uses collectathon token gating for world structure.
mechanics.expression: Super Mario Galaxy 2 uses collectathon token gating for world structure.

mechanics.map_notes: mount companion control drives progression in Super Mario Galaxy 2.
mechanics.expression: mount companion control drives progression in Super Mario Galaxy 2.

mechanics.map_notes: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Super Mario Galaxy 2.
mechanics.expression: Hazards and obstacles test traversal mastery in Super Mario Galaxy 2.

mechanics.map_notes: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.
mechanics.expression: Checkpoints and stage boundaries save progress between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives or health gates retries on failure.
mechanics.expression: Lives or health gates retries on failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Boss encounters follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.
mechanics.expression: Platform sections demand accurate jump timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on hazard and enemy contact.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss victories and key objectives unlock subsequent content. (Super Mario Galaxy 2)
mechanics.expression: Boss victories and key objectives unlock subsequent content. (Super Mario Galaxy 2)

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Super Mario Galaxy 2 through its core platformer loop.
